items.name: Realistic Tree Body - Nature Wood Suit
items.description: A high-quality Tree Body for your Roblox avatar. This Nature-themed bundle features detailed bark and root designs. Whether you want to be a living tree, an Ent, or a forest protector, this Wooden Suit is a must-have for your collection.

items.name: Relaxed Tapered Jean and Braided Leather Belt
items.description: In a medium indigo wash with whiskering throughout, this version of our Relaxed Tapered jean is crafted with Turkish denim and is artfully detailed to achieve a paint-splatter effect paired with a supple leather that is intricately braided to create this belt, which features a square metal buckle engraved with our signature logo.
